It contains no dynamic data processing, no user input handling, and no network requests beyond contract connection setup.\n   - The ABI only describes read-only functions related to token quoting, with no suspicious or malicious functions.\n   - The code does not process untrusted data or execute any code based on external inputs; it merely sets up interfaces.\n\n7. **Consistency of Scores with the Reports:**\n   - All reports agree that the code is benign, with no malicious or obfuscated content.\n   -
